Hardware Component File

ITX ITMaster V0.5

System Identification and Configuration Data

Metadata

File reference ITX_ITMaster_V0.5.json
Source type JSON Data Array
Status
Validated

Technical Warning

Ensure specific OBD protocol matching before hardware implementation to avoid controller lockout.

Safety Guidelines →

OBD Configuration Details

Protocol CAN
Baudrate 10400
Send ID 747
Receive ID 767
Functional Addr 58
Functional Name Navigation

Automatic Identifiers

Array Listing 2 Entries 
[
  {
    "diagversion": "8",
    "supplier": "AP9",
    "soft": "0000",
    "version": "0000"

    "supplier": "AP9",
    "soft": "0101",
    "version": "2545"
